title: Recipes - Must Be In The Game
description: This mod follows one simple rule: if it makes sense to craft it, you should be able to.
body:
✨🧰 Zeio's Extra More Recipes 🧰✨
📜 Full Recipe List

🎯 This mod adds 199 new recipes (Crafting 🔨 • Smelting 🔥 • Stonecutting 🪨)

✅ Uses ONLY vanilla items
🚫 No new blocks
🚫 No new items
💾 Fully data-driven
🌐 Server-side friendly

💡 Vanilla+ without breaking game balance!

♻️🌳 WOOD RECYCLING

🚤 Boats → Planks

Turn boats back into wood!

➡️ Any Boat = 🪵 4 matching Planks

🚪 Doors → Planks

➡️ Any Door = 🪵🪵 2 matching Planks

🧱 Trapdoors → Planks

➡️ Any Trapdoor = 🪵🪵 2 matching Planks

🪵 Slabs → Planks

⬆️⬇️ Stack 2 slabs = 🪵 1 Plank Block

🪜 Stairs → Planks

🟫 4 Stairs = 🪵🪵🪵 3 Planks

🌿➡️🪵 STICK SOURCES
🍃 Leaves → Stick

Any Leaves = 🪵 1 Stick

🌱 Saplings → Sticks

Any Sapling = 🪵🪵 2 Sticks

🪓 Logs → Sticks (Stonecutter)

Any Log / Stem = 🪵 ×8

🪧 Signs → Sticks

Any Sign = 🪵🪵

🪵 Other Sources

🌵 Dead Bush = 🪵🪵

🪜 Ladder = 🪵🪵🪵

🧶 STRING & WOOL
🐑 Wool → String

Any Wool Color = 🧶🧶🧶🧶

🎣 Items → String

🏹 Bow = 🧶🧶

🎣 Fishing Rod = 🧶🧶

🌿 Vines = 🧶

🔁 String → Wool

🧶🧶🧶🧶 = 🐑 White Wool

🪨 STONE RECYCLING

Reverse crafted stone parts!

Slabs ⬆️ → Full Blocks

Stairs 🔁 → 3 Blocks

Works for:
🪨 Cobblestone
🪨 Stone
🧱 Bricks
🏜️ Sandstone
🔥 Nether Bricks
🌑 Deepslate

🪟 GLASS RECYCLING

4 Glass Panes = 🪟 1 Glass Block

🎨 DYE ALTERNATIVES

🪨 Coal → ⚫ Black Dye

🔥 Charcoal → ⚫ Black Dye

🦴 Bone → ⚪⚪ White Dye

🌵 Cactus → 🟢 Green Dye

🍓 Sweet Berries → 🔴 Red Dye

🍞 FOOD CONVERSIONS

🍞 Bread → 🌾🌾 Wheat

🍉 Melon Slice → 🌱 Seeds

🎃 Pumpkin → 🌱🌱🌱🌱 Seeds

💀 BONE MEAL SOURCES

🥚 Egg → ☠️☠️ Bone Meal

📄 Paper → ☠️

🌾 Seeds → ☠️

🔥 SMELTING

🧟 Rotten Flesh → 🧥 Leather

🧱 MATERIAL CONVERSIONS
🪨 Stonecutter

Cobblestone → Gravel

Gravel → Sand

Ice → ❄️❄️ Snow Blocks

Blaze Rod → ✨✨✨ Blaze Powder

🔨 Crafting

Flint → Gravel

Crafting Table → 🪵🪵🪵🪵

Furnace → 🪨🪨🪨🪨🪨🪨🪨

Chain ↔ Iron Nuggets

Blaze Powder → Magma Cream

Nether Brick → Nether Wart Block

❄️ SNOW

Snow Block → ❄️❄️❄️❄️ Snowballs

4 Snowballs → Snow Block

🧊 ICE

Packed Ice → Ice

🌊 PRISMARINE

4 Shards → Prismarine

Prismarine → 4 Shards

📄 PAPER FROM KELP

🌿🌿🌿 Dried Kelp = 📄 Paper

🔦 TORCH ALTERNATIVE

Stick + Coal = 🔦🔦🔦🔦

Stick + Charcoal = 🔦🔦🔦🔦

🟧 WAX REMOVAL (1.21+)

Remove wax from ALL copper variants ⚡

🟠 Blocks
🚪 Doors
🪟 Grates
🪤 Trapdoors
💡 Bulbs
🧱 Cut / Chiseled variants

📌 VERSION SUPPORT

🟩 1.20.1 → 1.20.6
➡️ 179 Recipes

🟩 1.21+
➡️ Full 199 Recipes

⚙️ LOADERS SUPPORTED

🧵 Fabric
⚒️ Forge
🔩 NeoForge
🪡 Quilt
